emails.subject: Re: FW: Transwestern information requests
emails.body: Re: FW: Transwestern information requests Rod, Are you not hearing back from my people on this? If not, Julie and I will track them down this afternoon. Dan Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: Re: FW: Transwestern information requests
emails.body: Re: FW: Transwestern information requests I haven't heard back from Steve at all. Do you have anumber for him? Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: Re: FW: Transwestern information requests
emails.body: Re: FW: Transwestern information requests Rod, I just tracked down Steve. He is at 281 350 8441. He's checking his e mail now and is expecting your call. Dan Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: Re: Fw: Transwestern information requests
emails.body: Re: Fw: Transwestern information requests Rod, I'll be somewhere between Pueblo and the Royal Gorge, but I'll try to stop and patch in. I trust that everyone already understands what is contracted and the only concern is our recontracting capability. Right? Dan Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: Re: Fw: Transwestern information requests
emails.body: Re: Fw: Transwestern information requests Yes, plus the ability to grow or tokeep the it pnr and other revenue. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>
